description: A reviewer's rating and notes on a job application. The average of all rows is shown on the application. Status changes are NOT tracked here (kept orthogonal) — who/when a status changed comes from the application's version history. See ADR 053.

fields.description: The person who reviewed this application (links Person, the identity spine — Partner Contact is a child table and cannot be linked).
fields.label: Reviewer

name: Partner Job Application Review
